programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Katakuri notices his sister Flampe is sneakily providing poison needle back up in the shadows. Becoming enraged, he takes unexpected action that surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Smoothie increases her size and closes in on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leans on his training to bring out the power of his Haki! Meanwhile, the children of Big Mom gather as a massive force, ready to smash Luffy and the Straw Hats. Their resentment at being embarrassed fuels their desire to get revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Katakuri are locked in a duel to end all duels! Their powers ensure that each blow could be the last! Luffy must rely on his training, let all his thoughts out, and keep pushing on! Meanwhile, Sanji is about to land at Cacao Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's dramatic battle finally draws to a close! But even if he is able to pull out victory in the last moment, can he remember the key to escaping the Mirrorworld?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges safely! And Pekoms' bravery ensures he and the Straw Hats have a fighting chance! But can they withstand the full force of the Big Mom Pirates? At the last moment - a surprise explodes onto the scene!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji tries his best to save himself and his captain, Luffy! But the arrival of Germa has complicated matters. Whose side do these powerful superhumans fight on? In the end, sisterly love will see Sanji saved!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Sanji are safe! But the critical moment approaches - the fate of Totto Land rests on the taste of the wedding cake! Will it be sweet release or bitter defeat? Meanwhile, a cunning pincer attack leaves the Straw Hats hopelessly trapped.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the help of the Sun Pirates, the Straw Hats see their chance to escape! And the Sun Pirates bid farewell to their former captain. Mama finally tastes the Wedding Cake and the results are positively scrumptious!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Big Mom Pirates fooled! The Straw Hats have eluded their would-be tormentors with the help of the Sun Pirates! However, as the fleet of the Big Mom Pirates is still coming after them, Jimbei makes a crucial decision to help the Sunny to get away.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At a great cost of energy and life, the Straw Hats make it out of Totto Land. Left behind in their wake are allies and friends, and would-be lovers. As the sea opens before them, what price has been paid for their escape?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's recent exploits make their way around the world! The reputation of this mighty pirate begins to grow as all eyes look towards the Straw Hats' next move! Also - German 66 leaves an artifact behind which excites the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the royals make their way to the Reverie, the mighty Navy takes all precautions to make sure they don't fall prey to kidnappings! At the vanguard is Koby, who glimpses Luffy's exploits and remembers their shared past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A vicious pirate group led by Pinkbeard who describes himself as one of Blackbeard's affiliates attacks a town in the Kingdom of Lulucia while their king and able-bodied soldiers have gone to the Reverie. And four bizarre individuals come to help.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At New Marineford, Sakazuki, the new Admiral of the Fleet, hears the news about Luffy and recalls the tumultuous Paramount War that haunts the Navy! That game-changing war has repercussions that last into the present!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nobles from around the world gather for the Reverie as the echoes of the Paramount War resound! Among them are Shirahoshi and her family from the Ryugu Kingdom under the sea. Meanwhile, Admiral Fujitora has a conversation with his new colleague.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Stelly, Sabo's adopted brother and now the king of the Goa Kingdom, walks up to Garp who is escorting the royal family of the Fish-Man Island, with an air of importance and something up his sleeve.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi and her family finally reach the Holyland of Mariejois! But all the unexpected attention confuses her. Meanwhile, Vivi from Alabasta meets Leo and Rebecca from Dressrosa, and tells them the story of her journey with the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi reunites with Dalton and Dr. Kureha from the Sakura Kingdom and they share their memories of the Straw Hats with Shirahoshi and Rebecca. Meanwhile, a shadowy figure descends a long staircase at the castle in the Holyland and opens a mysterious door.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi crosses the fancy of a Celestial Dragon, and those living gods are not open to having their whims disobeyed! As she is dragged away, King Neptune comes to her rescue, risking life and limb by defying the Celestial Dragon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Emperors of the Sea, Big Mom and Kaido decide to team up against Luffy! Meanwhile, Garp hears about the wild exploits of his grandson, all while a mysterious outsider visits the highest authority in the world!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After sneaking into the Land of the Gods, Sabo sees the shocking figure of his friend – Kuma! Abused by the World Government as a pawn in their games, Kuma, who was made an example of what happens when you disobey the gods!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Reverie has begun! The representative kings and queens first discuss what to do with Straw Hat Luffy. Meanwhile the Revolutionary Army confirms its desire to save Kuma! All while they recount how the Straw Hats have grown!

programme.desc: In order to recruit a strong ally towards bringing down Kaido, Cat Viper and his crew stop by Whitebeard's homeland to see Marco, the 1st division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a deadly truck heist arms the killers with enough ammonium nitrate to construct a massive bomb, the team discovers a link to a terrorist group Maggie is working to infiltrate.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A teen shows up at FBI headquarters with a large bag of fentanyl, seeking the team's protection from the men who shot his father. Also, Nina comes to Scola with a proposal he is hesitant to accept.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The abduction of a young woman leads the team back to a cold case from 18 years ago, which pushes Isobel to reconnect with her old partner Jake (Tate Donovan) and take another shot at solving one of her first cases at the Bureau.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team jumps into action when JOC analyst Kelly Moran is taken hostage.

programme.title: Bad Ass 3: Bad Asses on the Bayou
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo)) and Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) return, this time to Louisiana in an attempt to find a kidnapped friend.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Lila, a grief-stricken mother reeling from her son's murder, attends a support group where she meets Eve, who urges her to take matters into her own hands to track down her son's killers. They soon embark on a journey of revenge, but also recovery.

programme.title: Jamesy Boy
programme.desc: Rage-filled teenager James is never one to back down from a fight. He jumps at the chance to run drugs and guns for a gang and quickly ends up behind bars.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: In this crime-drama starring football superstar Jim Brown, a notorious gangster must reconcile his past in order to make a future for his criminally-minded son.

programme.title: The River Murders
programme.desc: When a series of murder victims only common thread is their tie to the investigating detective, the FBI steps in while the detective and his partner try to catch the real killer.

programme.title: MAFIA
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a fierce crime boss (Ving Rhames) wreaks havoc on the streets. Detective Womack (Pam Grier) decides to put an end to this organized crime – even if it means breaking the law.

programme.title: Shooting Gallery
programme.desc: A street-wise man (Freddie Prinze Jr.) gets mixed up in a scheme involving a pool shark (Ving Rhames) and a crooked lawman.

programme.title: Jennifer Eight
programme.desc: They are the unidentified victims of an unsolved death spree, women linked by a killer’s gruesome handiwork and by police files giving them the code name “Jennifer.”

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A graduate student and his girlfriend set out on a cross-country road trip to research a book they are writing on serial killers. Along the way, they pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend who will take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: Bad Ass
programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran who becomes a local hero after saving a man from attackers on a city bus decides to take action when his best friend is murdered and the police show little interest in solving the crime.

programme.title: Bad Ass 2: Bad Asses
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) teams up with grumpy old agoraphobic Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) to kick ass and clean up the streets of L.A.

programme.title: Bad Ass 3: Bad Asses on the Bayou
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo)) and Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) return, this time to Louisiana in an attempt to find a kidnapped friend.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: In 1959, Truman Capote learns about the horrific and senseless murder of a family of four in Kansas. As he digs deeper into the story, he is inspired to expand the project into what would be his greatest work, In Cold Blood.

programme.title: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: Rain Man
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as an idealistic young wheeler-dealer whose life is changed forever when he discovers he has an autistic savant older brother (Dustin Hoffman, in a Best Actor Oscar-winning performance).

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: Truman doesn’t realize that his quaint hometown is a giant studio set run by a visionary producer/director/creator (Ed Harris), that folks living and working there are Hollywood actors, that even his incessantly bubbly wife is a contract player.

programme.title: Driveways
programme.desc: A lonesome boy accompanies his mother on a trip to clean out his late aunt's house, where he ends up forming an unexpected friendship with the retiree who lives next door.

programme.title: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: The Humans

programme.title: Tomb Raider

programme.title: Dragonslayer

programme.title: Hellraiser III: Hell On Earth
programme.desc: An ambitious TV reporter's life is changed forever after witnessing the death of a tormented teenage boy. In her twisted journey to uncover the truth, she discovers a strange puzzle box, uncovering a demonic world of pleasure and pain.

programme.title: Hellraiser IV: Bloodline

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In April 1999, three British climbers get caught in a snowstorm near the summit of Mt. McKinley. After a night in a cave, one climber develops snow blindness and another volunteer to go down to base camp but breaks both his legs in a fall.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In June 2003, Blake Stanfield and his aged dad Neil go kayaking in the Alaskan wilderness. Everything goes fine until they run into some ice on the river, and they soon find themselves swept underneath.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER

programme.desc: A geriatric playboy comes into the ER with a minor injury that quickly turns deadly; a health fanatic's juice diet leaves him in a comatose state; doctors juggling multiple critical patients nearly misdiagnose one who has suddenly deteriorated.

programme.desc: A resort doctor must treat a man critically injured by a boat propeller; a discharged patient sets off a deadly chain of events by getting a ride from his designated driver; the ER comes to a standstill when the computers and the head nurse are down.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Team Rocket’s latest invention is bound to be a hit...until Togepi and its newfound Sentret friend take it out for a spin!

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre armado asalta un hospital metropolitano y comienza a disparar a los médicos. El médico de emergencia David Bank trata a un niño de 10 años que es llevado a la sala después de recibir un golpe en la cabeza con una pelota de golf.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una madre y su hijo de 6 años son llevados rápidamente a la sala de emergencias del Dr. Kevin Veale después de un horrible accidente automovilístico. El cirujano ortopédico Dr. Douglas Lundy encuentra que su experiencia médica no es suficiente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los paramédicos se apresuran a la escena de un traumático accidente de carretera. El Dr. Eric Maniago ha tratado a muchos VIP, pero cuando una princesa se presenta en su sala de emergencias, se encuentra en un territorio desconocido.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El Dr. Sean Bush, experto en mordeduras de serpientes de fama mundial, se enfrenta a su peor pesadilla. Dra. Dee L’Archeveque cuando trata a un hombre con un palo de golf atravesado directamente en su cabeza.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Cuando un gancho de acero de cuatro libras atraviesa el cráneo de Gail Creek, el cirujano de trauma Joe Eric Johnston tiene la imposible tarea de mantenerlo vivo. El humor del inodoro adquiere un nuevo significado para la Dra. Dee Larcheveque.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El Dr. Warren Yamarick se enfrenta a uno de los momentos más difíciles de la medicina: tratar a su propio colega. El Dr. Armand Dorian pronto descubre que su sala de emergencias está inundada de estudiantes borrachos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La doctora Alexandra Dresel pone a prueba su entrenamiento cuando una víctima de atraco llega a la sala de emergencias. El Dr. Mauricio Heilbron Jr. debe probar los límites de su autocontrol cuando se le asignan dos casos increíbles.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un bebé aparentemente sano desarrolla repentinamente una deficiencia de oxígeno. Cuando la policía trae a un hombre desaliñado que dice ser el Ministro de un pequeño pueblo, el Dr. Kivela sospecha que hay más en la historia de lo que parece.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico abre el pecho de una enfermera y toma su corazón en su mano, en un esfuerzo desesperado por salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El dolor en la pierna de una mujer embarazada resulta ser un virus carnívoro, que amenaza con su vida y sus extremidades.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre adulto grita sin cesar sin razón, una madre joven está alerta pero helada, y un niño parece tener una sobredosis de drogas, pero lo niega.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una estudiante universitaria se derrumba en la sala de emergencias, y los médicos hacen horas de reanimación, con la esperanza de que reviva.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una joven enfermera se derrumba en la sala de emergencias, y sus compañeros de trabajo deben reiniciar su corazón. Un joven padre lleva a su bebé al hospital convencido de que hay gusanos en sus manos.

programme.desc: Anubis travels to Kelowna after discovering that it has mines of a more powerful source of energy that he can use to make his new weapon more destructive. The leaders of Kelowna contact SG-1 for their help, but make an ill-advised deal with Anubis.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A 15-year-old infiltrates the SGC with the startling news that he is Colonel Jack O'Neill, having mysteriously reverse aged 30 years overnight. Possessing O'Neill's knowledge, exact DNA and, above all, his attitude, can he really be O'Neill?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Through the help of Daniel, Teal'c visualizes that Rya'c and Bra'tac are being held prisoner in a Goa'uld death camp. With SG-1's help, Teal'c sets out to rescue his son and his mentor, but can he overcome his fears in time?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Six thousand light-years away, O'Neill and the SG-1 team discover a devastated universe where the inhabitants must live in a protective dome. They survive through an all-controlling computer system called the Link. But is it a savior, or a curse?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 finds a crashed spaceship containing hundreds of people in a cryogenic sleep. Stunned by an unseen weapon, the team is struck unconscious and, upon awakening, discovers that several of the frozen personalities now inhabit Daniel's body!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An SGC Naquadah mining operation is attacked by a native tribe of Unas. SG-1 is sent to protect the miners and discovers that the Unas are guarding land they believe is sacred. Instead of eradicating the Unas, Daniel races to negotiate with them.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Pedro sufre la soledad de perder a Julieta y prefiere dejar que salga de su vida para que ella aclare sus sentimientos. Gaspar recibe un sí de Guadalupe para hacer realidad el sueño de casarse con ella. José decide darle el apellido a Simón.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La verdad del atentado de José se revela y, cuando se descubre que fue Efraín quien lo mandó a golpear, la policía lo detiene. José le exige a Beatriz declarar lo que sabe. La familia de Guadalupe rechaza el anuncio de su matrimonio con Gaspar.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta pierde los límites y planea su venganza contra Paula en un juego que puede salirle muy caro. Beatriz le exige a Sofía pagar la fianza de Efraín y Amador o la delatará por su crimen. Don Emilio recibe ayuda de unos nobles campesinos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José le rompe el corazón a Paula cuando le revela las mentiras de Sofía sobre su padre. Ella decide escapar a la capital para refugiarse de su realidad en casa de Adela. Modesto sale de la hacienda para un encuentro que causará sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro empieza a ganar terreno con David. Antonia convence a su hijo mayor de quedarse en San Pedro, se muestra arrepentida y anuncia en las fiestas patronales la futura boda, dejando boquiabiertos a todos. Fernando es internado por su adicción.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La señora Guerra seduce a David con regalos caros, lo que despierta la envidia en otros niños. David huye y corre peligro. Alejandro lo rescata, pero la minera enfurecida amenaza a los hombres del pueblo, que instigan en sus hijos el odio hacia ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La noticia del compromiso de Alejandro y Gabriela llega hasta Fernando. Él escapa del centro de rehabilitación, enfrenta a su hermano y le confiesa que David es su hijo. Inocencia muere en brazos de Gastón, sin poder decir el nombre de su agresor.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Al saber quién es el violador de Gabriela, Alejandro le da una paliza a su hermano. Antonia encubre a Fernando y niega que él sea un violador. La prueba de ADN confirma que David es hijo de Fernando. Antonia lo celebra y usa a Irene contra Gabriela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora toma a Gabriela y a Juan de rehenes, trata de negociar un rescate con la policía y amenaza a Norma. Pepa visita a Martín, le cuenta las sospechas que tiene de los malos pasos de Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco y Armando reviven viejas enemistades, el amigo de Fernando dispara y quien resulta herida es Rosario, luego de un forcejeo, Armando paga con la muerte. Los captores están acorralados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes deciden pagar el dinero del rescate por su hermano, pero Dínora y Fernando no cumplen con la entrega de Gabriela y Juan, y en medio de una balacera huyen con ellos en la camioneta.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La camioneta donde viajan Dínora, Fernando y sus rehenes, se atasca en arenas movedizas, tienen que esconderse en el mangle. Carmela y Malcolm huyen con el dinero, pero son capturados.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Monkey Business

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: What does it take to rescue some of the world’s biggest, fastest and strongest animals? Find out as Jack counts down the amazing rescue stories of six special creatures. Chimps, dolphins, cheetahs, Asian elephants, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: After an amazing helicopter trip to the remote location, Jack goes behind-the-scenes at a trout hatchery. Then he and Sue exchange practical jokes while fly-fishing along the Sun River.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack Hanna as he counts down the species that live their lives where other creatures fear to tread – right on the edge!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Olympians
programme.desc: Jungle Jack has recruited seven incredible athletes that you'll never see at the Olympics, like flight-footed felines, boxing kangaroos and powerful primates. See who gets the gold as Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his family as they immerse themselves into the elephant population at Zimbabwe's Hwange National Park. The Hanna's hide-out underground in a unique bunker at one of Hwange's watering holes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head to Rwanda for an incredible encounter with Golden Monkeys before getting a taste of the local fishing traditions, and they visit a primary school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack leaves his safari truck behind and treks into the wild, on foot, to meet animals face-to-face. Come along as he encounters, Lions, Bats, Cheetahs, Hippos, Sea Turtles and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack's daughter travels to British Columbia to catch sight of the Vancouver Island Marmot, one of the rarest mammals on earth. Meanwhile on Salt Spring Island, Jungle Jack visits a rehab center specializing in the holistic care of native animals.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six of his all-time scariest safaris. Come along as he comes face-to-face with Alligators, Lions, Elephants, Cheetah, Tigers and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out why all of the animals on today’s countdown are showing off their pearly whites. From the hippos' mega-chompers to snakes with fangs that inject toxic venom, and piranhas, crocs, African elephants and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Helpers
programme.desc: Prepare to be amazed by seven true stories of some truly remarkable service animals on today’s Wild Countdown! From K-9 cops to dolphin detectives, we’re counting down seven remarkable animal super stars!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an epic adventure into South Africa's Zululand. All that before meeting the notorious Zulu warriors.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue pack their bags and head to Alberta, Canada! Come along as they encounter wild moose in the Canadian Rockies, cross paths with bighorn sheep and spot a gang of travelling elk.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet the loveable loners of the animal kingdom. Moose, Black Rhinos, Leatherback Sea Turtles, Platypus, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle as he saddles up for six amazing ranching adventures! From working a dude ranch in Canada to herding sheep with Patagonian gauchos, and cattle ranching in Montana, Jack is living the ultimate cowboy life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack brings us bouncing baby animals from around the world. Some are cute, some are cuddly, and some bring us hope for the next generation of wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family brave the unpredictable weather and visit the beautiful islands of Fiji. A trip to see red-footed boobies quickly turns into a sea snake-infested island expedition.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In a rainforest outside Rio de Janeiro, Jack visits a breeding program that's slowly restoring the wild population of endangered Golden Lion Tamarins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to the Umfolozi Big 5 Game Reserve in South Africa for amazing animal encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the waters of Botswana's Okavango Delta! The world's largest inland delta provides a beautiful home to thriving wildlife like Crocs, Hippos, and Elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of Jack in his own backyard on this trip to Bigfork, Montana. And, Jack and Sue visit Triple D Game Ranch to get an up-close look at bears, wolves, and even an elusive cougar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Everybody loves baby animals – especially Jack and Sue! Check out some unpredictable moments from undeniably cute babies like wombats, koalas, elephants -- and even a black rhino named after you know who.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along on an epic adventure to meet the big cats of Tanzania. These top predators include Lions, Cheetahs, and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: Caring for animals can be a big job! Join Jack for some on-the-job-training as he explores six incredible, dangerous and dirty animal jobs, like wrangling crocodiles, caring for elephants, herding cattle and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Armed with Armor
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down wild creatures that come equipped with their very own body armor!

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.desc: Jadis planea una muerte horrenda para Negan. Mientras, Morgan va en busca de Henry y Rick sale de Hilltop para cazar a los que huyeron durante el asalto comandado por Simon. Finalmente, los dos se encuentran en territorio enemigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras los hombres de Negan continúan con su ofensiva, Aaron sigue buscando aliados nuevos, pese a que pueda costarle la vida. Daryl y Rosita se enfrentan a un viejo amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades unen sus fuerzas en la última batalla contra los Salvadores. Negan ha conseguido entregar a Rick un mapa con instrucciones mapas, para así tenderle una emboscada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie busca a Negan para que la ayude a salvar a su hijo, al que ha secuestrado un sádico superviviente, al que llaman el Croata, que vive en Manhattan. Negan accede a acompañarla a cambio de que permita a Ginny integrarse en su comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Una anciana ayuda a Maggie y Negan a escapar de los zombis y los conduce hasta su tribu, a la cual los soldados del Croata tratan de exterminar. Negan revela que conoce al Croata: trabajó a sus órdenes hasta que lo expulsó por ser demasiado sádico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: La tribu les explica a Maggie y Negan el modus operandi de los Burazi, el cual ellos reconocen idéntico al que usaban antes los Salvadores, por lo que saben cómo atacarlos. Luther descubre que se ofrece una recompensa por Negan y lo ataca.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie y Negan llevan a cabo un ataque, pero no todo sale de acuerdo al plan. Ginny y Armstrog tienen inesperados contactos con otros.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Negan y Perlie se realizan confesiones mutuas mientras se abren paso por Manhattan. Maggie llega a la conclusión de que Tommaso traicionó a la tribu y provocó el ataque en el Madison Square Garden. Tommaso admite que llegó a un acuerdo con el Croata.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: La tensión entre Maggie y Negan alcanza el punto máximo. Continúa la búsqueda de Ginny. Surgen preguntas sobre el camino a seguir por Armstrong.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new season kicks off with a ranch house in Westerly, RI. Tom and Kevin tour the house and admire the paneling. Richard tours the basement with Jeff. Jenn and Roger consider landscape options.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mark and Jeff take down the chimney. Scott and Shayla window shop. Jeff and Richard find new plumbing products. The ranch’s exterior walls come down. Jeff decides to reuse the original rafters.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew places a center beam to support the second story. A hole is cut in the original foundation for a new window. Kevin visits an engineered lumber factory. Tommy and Jeff raise the end gables.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The gambrel roof profiles are raised. The crew stands up the second-floor walls. Tommy shows the new apprentices how to cut roof rafters. Richard works on the project’s septic system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy teaches the new apprentices to frame a deck. Jeff’s crew frames the exterior flair detail. Jenn learns about Westerly granite. Jeff installs a window. Richard and Jeff work on the drain stacks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin reviews the progress of the Westerly house. Tommy and Jeff install the main staircase. Kevin looks at clapboard siding technology. Richard watches the furnace being installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Jeff work on a coffered ceiling. Jenn watches granite get cut for the backyard steps. Richard reviews the septic system. Jeff installs the interior doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new propane tank goes in. Norm advises on composite decking. Jeff and Tommy add final touches to the coffered ceiling. Shelving goes into the office. Mark applies a stone veneer to the chimney.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jeff shows Kevin how he installs shelves and a mantel. Norm panels the playroom. Kevin visits the apprentices at a timber framing school. Jenn uses granite for backyard steps.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm uses old pine to make a coffee table. Mauro teaches apprentice Kathryn to whitewash paneling. Tommy and Jeff build a pergola for the deck. Kevin helps with a shutter assembly.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Televisions are installed; Blinds and curtains; Water heater; Plants and outdoor lighting; Flagpole.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Tommy take the tour with the homeowners and Jeff. Norm presents his pine coffee table. Jenn gives Tommy the garden tour. Everyone meets at the flagpole to raise the flags.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A year after California’s worst wildfire, the people of Paradise are still clearing the devastation. About 90% of the homes were lost. Kevin, Tom, and Richard meet families determined to rebuild.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowner fabricates a stone hearth. Richard learns about automatic sprinkler systems. Kevin sees a simulator that shows how the Camp Fire spread. Tom inspects a vent designed to resist embers.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Luke and Crystal move in. Kevin visits a fire test lab. Jose and Anna’s house gets roof shingles. Mark installs a stone veneer. Kevin tours farms. Jenn meets an architect who designed a town memorial.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Paradise residents discuss rebuilding. Tom inspects engineered siding. Richard looks at a backup battery. A former fire chief discusses preparation. At the Memorial, heroes and survivors are honored.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Curtis Strong
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Curtis Strong fought at the Sports Arena in San Diego, Ca. in a 6 round bout that lasted 4 rounds ending in a technical knockout victory for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Erik Morales 1
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Erik Morales fought Manny Pacquiao for the WBC and IBA Super Featherweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight that went the distance, Morales got the best of Pacquiao who seemed to have an off-night.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Felix Sturm
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2004 Oscar De La Hoya fought Felix Sturm at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO Middleweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in an unanimous decision win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Jeff Horn
programme.desc: On July 2nd, 2017 Manny Pacquiao battled Jeff Horn for the WBO World Welterweight title at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane in a 12 round bout that ended in a victory for Horn.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Giorgio Campanella
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Oscar De La hoya fought Giorgio Campanella at the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas for the WBO World Super Featherweight title with De La Hoya knocking out Campanella in the thrid round securing his victory.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs David Diaz
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao and David Diaz fought eachother at Mandalay Bay Events Center in Las Vegas for the WBC World Lightweight titles with Diaz going down in the ninth round Pacquiao secured his victory.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Hector Camacho
programme.desc: On September 13th, 1997 Oscar De La Hoya fought Hector Camacho for the WBC World Welterweight title at the Thomas and Mack Center in Las Vegas the twelve round bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Chris Algieri
programme.desc: On November 23rd, 2014, Manny Pacquiao and Chris Algieri faced each other for the WBO Welterweight Title in Macao. Manny Pacquaio defeated Chris Algieri after knocking Algieri down six times and securing a unanimous decision.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs John John Molina
programme.desc: On February 18th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought John John Molina for the WBO World Lightweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout resulting in a win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Julio Cesar Chavez 1
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1996 Oscar De La Hoya and Julio Cesar Chavez fought for the first time for WBC World super Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that ended by technical knockout in the fourth round giving the win to De La Hoya.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2009, Manny Pacquiao fought Miguel Cotto for the WBO and WBC Diamond Welterweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Pacquiao put on a dominant performance, forcing the ref to stop the fight in round 12.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Luis Ramon Campas
programme.desc: On May 3rd, 2003 Oscar De La Hoya faced Luis Ramon Campas for WBA and WBC World super welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas the ended by technical knockout in the 7th round with De La Hoya securing the victory.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Jeff Mayweather faced eachother at the Hilton Hotel in Las Vegas in an 8 round bout then ended by technical knockout in the fourth round securing the victory for De la Hoya.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's about to finish Noah, but Mokuba protects Noah from his final blow! Will Kaiba sacrifice his beloved brother in exchange for freedom, or will the brotherly bond remain unbreakable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: For every turn that passes, one of Yugi's friends is transformed into stone! As more and more of his friends harden into solid rock, can Yugi defeat Noah before he runs out of turns and transforms into stone himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are petrified into solid stone statues, but their spirits live on! Their combined souls energize Yugi into a noble fight, but is spirit going to win the duel when Yugi's not drawing the right cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has defeated Noah... but they still can't escape from the virtual world! The real reason behind their entrapment is revealed... as is the true villain pulling the strings!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba squares off against his stepfather Gozaburo for their final battle, Yugi and friends are attacked by endless hordes of monsters! Their only hope is Noah, but they can't expect help from their enemy... can they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey may have fought some of the fiercest fights in Battle City, but has all his training taught him to become an elite duelist? Joey's gonna show what he's made of in the conclusion to the four-man battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey thinks this duel can't turn any worse... but Marik has all the pieces necessary to summon The Winged Dragon of Ra! Can Joey prevent Marik from summoning the Egyptian God Card, or is victory simply not in the cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba has all the monsters necessary to summon Obelisk the Tormentor to finish Yugi off! Though overwhelmed and outmatched, nothing is going to stop Yugi from trying to summon his Egyptian God first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!
